description_long: This factory building complex is situated within a rectangular plot bordered by paved roads and lined with regularly spaced trees. The main structure is a large, multi-bay industrial building with a flat roof, featuring several large industrial windows and a series of rooftop smokestacks and mechanical units. Adjacent to the main building is a smaller auxiliary structure, likely serving as an office or utility area, with its own parking lot and visible entryways. The site includes multiple vehicle access points, loading dock doors, and designated parking areas for cars and trucks, as well as a delivery truck and a few parked vehicles. The grounds are landscaped with green lawns and trees, and the perimeter is clearly defined by the surrounding roads. The overall appearance is functional and modern, with an emphasis on accessibility and industrial utility.
description: A modern industrial factory complex with a large main building, rooftop smokestacks, industrial windows, and adjacent office and parking areas, surrounded by roads and landscaping.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the factory complex from above, highlighting the main building, adjacent office, parking lots, and the surrounding roads with tree-lined medians.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front approach, emphasizing the main entrance, parking areas, and the loading dock with a delivery truck nearby.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear and side of the complex, showing the auxiliary building, additional parking, and the full length of the main structure with visible rooftop features.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a back view, focusing on the rear facade of the main building, the tree-lined perimeter, and the secondary access points.
